title: DataGrid
description:
A data grid component with rich callback support for sorting,
filtering, pagination, cell editing, and row selection.

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Grid data rows

properties.name: onReady
properties.description: Called when the grid finishes rendering

properties.name: onDestroy
properties.description: Called when the grid is unmounted

properties.name: onSearch
properties.description: Called when search input changes

properties.name: onPageChange
properties.description: Called when page number changes

properties.name: onSelectAll
properties.description: Called when "select all" checkbox is toggled

properties.name: onRowClick
properties.description: Called when a row is clicked

properties.name: onSort
properties.description: Called when sort configuration changes

properties.name: onSelectionChange
properties.description: Called when selection state changes

properties.name: onCellEdit
properties.description: Called when a cell is edited

properties.name: onRowReorder
properties.description: Called when a row is dropped during drag-and-drop reorder

properties.name: onCellDoubleClick
properties.description: Called on cell double-click with row and column context

properties.name: formatCell
properties.description: Custom cell renderer, returns string representation

properties.name: rowClassName
properties.description: Row class name resolver

properties.name: validateEdit
properties.description: Validates a cell edit, returns error message or null to accept

properties.name: loadData
properties.description: Async data loader for server-side pagination

properties.name: sortComparator
properties.description: Custom comparator for sorting

properties.name: isRowSelectable
properties.description: Predicate to determine if a row is selectable

properties.name: filterRow
properties.description: Row filter predicate

properties.name: onSubscribe
properties.description: Provides an unsubscribe function for external data updates

properties.name: onError
properties.description: Error handler with retry context

properties.name: transformRow
properties.description: Transform row data before display
